cohort: 5 trials (P1_T1-T3, P2_T2-T3), chart-free, trained lstsq matrix, exposure anchor

baseline_mesh_roi_global_exposure.note: Full tessellation mean vs FitSkin cheek (spatial mismatch)

cheek_roi_only.role: Spatial: sample inside MediaPipe cheek hull ∩ mesh

skin_mask_exposure_only.role: Photometric: flash scale from skin-mask median luma; still mesh ROI for Lab

cheek_roi_plus_skin_exposure.role: Combined; skin exposure helps mainly when cheek ROI is active

methods_text_suggestion: We report a factorial ablation: cheek ROI alone reduced median ΔE00 from 5.26 to 4.66 (−0.59); skin-mask exposure alone with mesh ROI did not improve the cohort median (5.30). With cheek ROI, adding skin-mask exposure scaling reduced median ΔE00 from 4.66 to 4.50 (−0.17), with larger trial-level gains on P2.
